Dear Sir/Madam, 
 
Subject: Audio recording of earnings conference call for the quarter and half year ended 
September 30, 2022 
 
In continuation of our letter dated November 8, 2022 and pursuant to Regulation 30(6) of SEBI 
(Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, the audio recording of 
the earnings call held today on November 9, 2022 at 06.00 PM IST is available on Company’s 
website at the below mentioned path:  
 
https://www.hikal.com/uploads/documents/HikalEarningsCallQ2FY23-Audiorecording.mp3  
 
This is for your information and records. 
 
 
Thank you, 
 
Yours Sincerely, 
for HIKAL LIMITED
